name: clock signal connected to module output port
description: Code should include a clock signal that is directly connected to or drives a module output port

name: clock signal passed as submodule input
description: Code should include a clock signal passed as an argument to an instantiated submodule

name: register clocked while clock has non-register uses
description: Code should include a register clocked by a signal that is also used elsewhere in the design, such as in assignments or port connections
